TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Elton Brand nalecuhan i Cortlandt Manor, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elton Brand i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 3 bulad 11 demiad, 1979 a mihca, Elton Brand, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôr~…æton brand nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ¶ortr~…æandt manor, n…ôw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôr~…æton brand i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ *, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu ¶ƒßi ¶ago bur~…ær~…æs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, …ôr~…æton brand, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Elton Brand nalecuhan i Cortlandt Manor, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elton Brand i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Chicago Bulls putiput. 3 bulad 11 demiad, 1979 a mihca, Elton Brand, miunduay.
